---
title: 'Untitled Post'
date: '2024-09-26T16:08:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Topos Creative, LLC'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '8341441685103461798'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Topos Creative, LLC/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom&nbsp;<span style="background-color: white; color: #202122; font-family: sans-serif; font-size: 14px;">שָׁלוֹם</span>: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe</span></div>

Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant | Freelancer
<div><br /></div>
